TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ronironan a niyaro' Ingata no pasawaliay 11 a lalan 157K itini i pala no Piyoma o Folafolangan ko ngangan no na niyaro', itini masa'op malaniyaro' ko Pangcah itini, pangangan han no finacadan Folafolangan han, o Siwkolan i o Roniron han, o roniron akilan. o itiniay a Pangcah saheto i 1950 a miheca, nai Kalolan a ato i Etolan a niyaro' ko tayni a mafolaw "Itiya ho o niyaro' no Folafolangan, anini sato no karoroan to" ano sa'osien o maceremay to a ira koni niyaro'. O tada kasasiroma nona Karoroan a niyaro', to mihecahecaan saka 7 a folad 10 a romi'ad misatapang to miilisin, to cecay a miheca itini i pasawali a niyaro' no Pangcah sa rataray miilisin a niyaro'. Tomihecahecaan miilisin ko finacadan no Karoroan itini ika'ayaw no "Ronironan a sefi" miilisin masakero cangra, ira ho ko pisalisin palemed to kawas no riyar ato mifetek to to'as, itira i riyar no Karoroan misataloan micelem anca pasalil mifoting. Tona pina a romi'ad pisalisinan pasalilan kinayra a foting, no polong no niyaro' a kinayra, emineng pakilac ko finacadan malacecay a komaen. Roma sato, o ilisin no Karoroan, roma i mipalecad to misaPosongay a finacadan to ilisin no roma aniyaro' ato rayray no palafangay a demak. Mato pito ko kasafinacadan no Yincomin tona Posong, maeming tona pahanhanan no mitiliday miilisin to ko kasafinacadan. To mihecahecaan no misa Posongfay o Karoroan ko misatapangay a miilisin, ira ho kono Posong makapahay sanay mapolongay a ilisin, itira no piyoma Katipo a niyaro' misalisin to pilidong to hafay, ato no Lokay a ilisin, Nengneng han maemin, onini to Karoroan ko sarakat a milengatay tonini a demak. Tona pina a mihecaan, o Pangcah nona Roniron a niyaro, pakaynien nangra tona patirengan "Yofayof no Karoroan a siyaku" no aniniay kasawasil no Siyaku, onini to a yofayof ko palowaday to sakacakat no tayal ato palowad to serangawan no finacadan. Onini a yofayof i 2008 a miheca 1a folad 13 a romi'ad mapatireng koni yofayof, mikapotay a tamdaw 40 ko tamdaw, o Karoro a tamdaw ko saalomanay a mikapot. Toni vKaroroan a niyaro' adihay ko kasasiroma nangra no pakatiliday taholican no riyar ato kasasiroma no serayan, nika anini sato malecad to misi'ayaw to kicay ato kasadak no tamdaw talapapotal mikilim to ka'oripan, malasaka o 'orip ato no tireng to a serangawan, cato ka parayray. Orasaka onini to a "Yofayof no Karoroan" itinien to nika tomireng no palalanay to pisalamaan no niyaro' no Roniron, mitanam matatelek ato tata'akay pitilidan no Posong, kinkiwing no Ceng-fu, palowad to sakacakat no Siyako ato mipa'es to talihocan a demak, lalangen ko mikari'angay to kinaira, itinien i no tamdawan ato talihocan a misatapang a parayray. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
S.PHON: ro~uniro~unan a nijaro~u ° iŇčata no~u pasawa…ĺiaj ** a …ĺa…ĺan ***k itini i pa…ĺa no~u pijo~uma o~u fo~u…ĺafo~u…ĺaŇčan ko~u ŇčaŇčan no~u na nijaro~u °, itini masa °o~up ma…ĺanijaro~u ° ko~u paŇč ¶ańß itini, paŇčaŇčan ńßan no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan fo~u…ĺafo~u…ĺaŇčan ńßan, o~u siwko~u…ĺan i o~u ro~uniro~un ńßan, o~u ro~uniro~un aki…ĺan. o~u itiniaj a paŇč ¶ańß sańß…ôto~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a, nai ka…ĺo~u…ĺan a ato~u i …ôto~u…ĺan a nijaro~u ° ko~u tajni a mafo~u…ĺaw "itija ńßo~u o~u nijaro~u ° no~u fo~u…ĺafo~u…ĺaŇčan, anini sato~u no~u karo~uro~uan to~u" ano~u sa °o~usi…ôn o~u ma ¶…ôr…ômaj to~u a ira ko~uni nijaro~u °. o~u ta…¨~…ģa kasasiro~uma no~una karo~uro~uan a nijaro~u °, to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misatapaŇč to~u mii…ĺisin, to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a mińß…ô ¶a itini i pasawa…ĺi a nijaro~u ° no~u paŇč ¶ańß sa rataraj mii…ĺisin a nijaro~u °. to~umińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan mii…ĺisin ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u karo~uro~uan itini ika °ajaw no~u "ro~uniro~unan a s…ôfi" mii…ĺisin masak…ôro~u ¶aŇčra, ira ńßo~u ko~u pisa…ĺisin pa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u kawas no~u rijar ato~u mif…ôt…ôk to~u to~u °as, itira i rijar no~u karo~uro~uan misata…ĺo~uan mi ¶…ô…ĺ…ôm an ¶a pasa…ĺi…ĺ mifo~utiŇč. to~una pina a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pisa…ĺisinan pasa…ĺi…ĺan kinajra a fo~utiŇč, no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u nijaro~u ° a kinajra, …ômin…ôŇč paki…ĺa ¶ ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj a ko~uma…ôn. ro~uma sato~u, o~u i…ĺisin no~u karo~uro~uan, ro~uma i mipa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u misapo~uso~uŇčaj a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan to~u i…ĺisin no~u ro~uma anijaro~u ° ato~u rajraj no~u pa…ĺafaŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. mato~u pito~u ko~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u jin ¶o~umin to~una po~uso~uŇč, ma…ômiŇč to~una pańßanńßanan no~u miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj mii…ĺisin to~u ko~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan. to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan no~u misa po~uso~uŇčfaj o~u karo~uro~uan ko~u misatapaŇčaj a mii…ĺisin, ira ńßo~u ko~uno~u po~uso~uŇč makapańßaj sanaj mapo~u…ĺo~uŇčaj a i…ĺisin, itira no~u pijo~uma katipo~u a nijaro~u ° misa…ĺisin to~u pi…ĺi…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ńßafaj, ato~u no~u …ĺo~ukaj a i…ĺisin, n…ôŇčn…ôŇč ńßan ma…ômin, o~unini to~u karo~uro~uan ko~u sarakat a mi…ĺ…ôŇčataj to~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak. to~una pina a mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u paŇč ¶ańß no~una ro~uniro~un a nijaro~u, pakajni…ôn naŇčra to~una patir…ôŇčan "jo~ufajo~uf no~u karo~uro~uan a sijako~u~u" no~u aniniaj kasawasi…ĺ no~u sijako~u~u, o~unini to~u a jo~ufajo~uf ko~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaj to~u saka ¶akat no~u taja…ĺ ato~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u s…ôraŇčawan no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. o~unini a jo~ufajo~uf i **** a mińß…ô ¶a *a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mapatir…ôŇč ko~uni jo~ufajo~uf, mikapo~utaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u karo~uro~u a tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u saa…ĺo~umanaj a mikapo~ut. to~uni b~vkaro~uro~uan a nijaro~u ° a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kasasiro~uma naŇčra no~u pakati…ĺi…¨~…ģaj tańßo~u…ĺi ¶an no~u rijar ato~u kasasiro~uma no~u s…ôrajan, nika anini sato~u ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u misi °ajaw to~u ki ¶aj ato~u kasa…¨~…ģak no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ta…ĺapapo~uta…ĺ miki…ĺim to~u ka °o~uripan, ma…ĺasaka o~u °o~urip ato~u no~u tir…ôŇč to~u a s…ôraŇčawan, ¶ato~u ka parajraj. o~urasaka o~unini to~u a "jo~ufajo~uf no~u karo~uro~uan" itini…ôn to~u nika to~umir…ôŇč no~u pa…ĺa…ĺanaj to~u pisa…ĺamaan no~u nijaro~u ° no~u ro~uniro~un, mitanam matat…ô…ĺ…ôk ato~u tata °akaj piti…ĺi…¨~…ģan no~u po~uso~uŇč, kinkiwiŇč no~u ¶…ôŇč-fo~u~u, pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u saka ¶akat no~u sijako~u ato~u mipa °…ôs to~u ta…ĺińßo~u ¶an a …¨~…ģ…ômak, …ĺa…ĺaŇč…ôn ko~u mikari °aŇčaj to~u kinaira, itini…ôn i no~u tam…¨~…ģawan ato~u ta…ĺińßo~u ¶an a misatapaŇč a parajraj. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw .
S.FORM: Ronironan a niyaro' Ingata no pasawaliay 11 a lalan 157K itini i pala no Piyoma o Folafolangan ko ngangan no na niyaro', itini masa'op malaniyaro' ko Pangcah itini, pangangan han no finacadan Folafolangan han, o Siwkolan i o Roniron han, o roniron akilan. o itiniay a Pangcah saheto i 1950 a miheca, nai Kalolan a ato i Etolan a niyaro' ko tayni a mafolaw "Itiya ho o niyaro' no Folafolangan, anini sato no karoroan to" ano sa'osien o maceremay to a ira koni niyaro'. O tada kasasiroma nona Karoroan a niyaro', to mihecahecaan saka 7 a folad 10 a romi'ad misatapang to miilisin, to cecay a miheca itini i pasawali a niyaro' no Pangcah sa rataray miilisin a niyaro'. Tomihecahecaan miilisin ko finacadan no Karoroan itini ika'ayaw no "Ronironan a sefi" miilisin masakero cangra, ira ho ko pisalisin palemed to kawas no riyar ato mifetek to to'as, itira i riyar no Karoroan misataloan micelem anca pasalil mifoting. Tona pina a romi'ad pisalisinan pasalilan kinayra a foting, no polong no niyaro' a kinayra, emineng pakilac ko finacadan malacecay a komaen. Roma sato, o ilisin no Karoroan, roma i mipalecad to misaPosongay a finacadan to ilisin no roma aniyaro' ato rayray no palafangay a demak. Mato pito ko kasafinacadan no Yincomin tona Posong, maeming tona pahanhanan no mitiliday miilisin to ko kasafinacadan. To mihecahecaan no misa Posongfay o Karoroan ko misatapangay a miilisin, ira ho kono Posong makapahay sanay mapolongay a ilisin, itira no piyoma Katipo a niyaro' misalisin to pilidong to hafay, ato no Lokay a ilisin, Nengneng han maemin, onini to Karoroan ko sarakat a milengatay tonini a demak. Tona pina a mihecaan, o Pangcah nona Roniron a niyaro, pakaynien nangra tona patirengan "Yofayof no Karoroan a siyaku" no aniniay kasawasil no Siyaku, onini to a yofayof ko palowaday to sakacakat no tayal ato palowad to serangawan no finacadan. Onini a yofayof i 2008 a miheca 1a folad 13 a romi'ad mapatireng koni yofayof, mikapotay a tamdaw 40 ko tamdaw, o Karoro a tamdaw ko saalomanay a mikapot. Toni vKaroroan a niyaro' adihay ko kasasiroma nangra no pakatiliday taholican no riyar ato kasasiroma no serayan, nika anini sato malecad to misi'ayaw to kicay ato kasadak no tamdaw talapapotal mikilim to ka'oripan, malasaka o 'orip ato no tireng to a serangawan, cato ka parayray. Orasaka onini to a "Yofayof no Karoroan" itinien to nika tomireng no palalanay to pisalamaan no niyaro' no Roniron, mitanam matatelek ato tata'akay pitilidan no Posong, kinkiwing no Ceng-fu, palowad to sakacakat no Siyako ato mipa'es to talihocan a demak, lalangen ko mikari'angay to kinaira, itinien i no tamdawan ato talihocan a misatapang a parayray. Pi'arawan to lakaw .
